Okay, the user wants to book an appointment. Let me check the clinic info. The booking link is /booking. I should guide them there. Also, I need to mention the loyalty points since they earn points on every booking. Let me make sure to include that. The response should be friendly and offer further help if needed. Let me structure it step by step.

First, acknowledge their request. Then provide the booking link. Mention the loyalty points. Ask if they need help with anything else. Keep it under 120 words. Check for any emergencies, but since they just want to book, no emergency here. Don't mention being an AI. Alright, that should cover it.

Great! You can book your appointment online at /booking. We’re open Monday–Saturday, 9 AM – 6 PM IST. As a valued patient, you’ll also earn loyalty points on your visit! Would you like help choosing a specialist or treatment type before proceeding?
